panels.description: FIXED: Previous metric used avalanche_handler_messages{op="query_failed"} which does not exist. Now uses avalanche_snowman_polls_successful and avalanche_snowman_polls_failed.
panels.title: Percentage of Successful Polls

panels.description: FIXED query7: Previous metric used avalanche_handler_messages{op="query_failed"} which does not exist. Now uses avalanche_snowman_polls_failed.
panels.title: Requests Failed

panels.description: Execution efficiency: nanoseconds of block verification time per unit of gas processed. Lower is better. Calculated as rate(verify_time) / rate(gas_processed). High values indicate slow block execution.
panels.title: Nanoseconds Per Gas
